title: nuwc #5127
definition:
1) to flee, escape
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to flee
        1a2) to escape
        1a3) to take flight,m depart, disappear
        1a4) to fly (to the attack) on horseback
    1b) (Polel) to drive at
    1c) (Hithpolel) to take flight
    1d) (Hiphil)
        1d1) to put to flight
        1d2) to drive hastily
        1d3) to cause to disappear, hide
